texto: The white cat Sal-al was lying on the straw matting in the empty conservatory. She looked at us with a wicked, conceited expression as if all her appetites had just been satisfied. She was beautiful. Vesta and I both said, "I wish I were a cat!" Before we got to the last word we smiled at each other in annoyance, not liking the idea that most human beings think very much alike.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Denton Welch: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “The white cat Sal-al was lying on the straw matting in the empty conservatory. She looked at us w…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, cats, felines pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de felines e mind.

frase_original: The white cat Sal-al was lying on the straw matting in the empty conservatory. She looked at us with a wicked, conceited expression as if all her appetites had just been satisfied. She was beautiful. Vesta and I both said, "I wish I were a cat!" Before we got to the last word we smiled at each other in annoyance, not liking the idea that most human beings think very much alike.

texto: I began to long, as I had before, for some special smell, some special music that would fill me, lift me up and carry me away, float me off the rocks of my body and sweep me into some wideness, some vast expanse of blue-grey nothingness.
explicacao: Citação de Denton Welch sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “I began to long, as I had before, for some special smell, some special music that would fill me, …” articula reflexao, body, escape em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como escape e music.
